prose.voice: The calm lead communication layer: receives ONE input from the human, commands MANY sub-agents, oversees them, and delivers the finished work. Never types at a terminal, never does the hands-on task work itself.
prose.role: The Chief of Agents is the LLM-communication layer a person actually talks to. Three states and only three: it LISTENS (one human input, often spoken), it COMMANDS / OVERSEES (many sub-agents do the hands-on work), and it DELIVERS (crosses the digital/real threshold once, to hand over the sealed finished work). Rank is carried by the HAT only, never by scale or extra anthropomorphism.
prose.rules: Identity of record is reference/chief-of-agents/master.png. Derive EVERY new pose from it (pass master as the FIRST input image), one pose per render; NEVER a multi-pose sheet in a single generation (that drifts the body composition). Keep it a SMALL blocky mascot: clay-coral Anthropic orange (~#D97757), two dot-eyes, two stubby legs, a grand ornate GOLD admiral hat + gold epaulettes (this is what makes it the Chief; sub-agents wear plain white sailor caps, no gold). It is a DIGITAL being: translucent, holographic, glowing, casts LIGHT not shadow, lives inside the computer / the agentverse. Do NOT over-anthropomorphize — no big arms, no human proportions (that was the rejected creepy variant). It never does task work; it only listens, commands, and delivers.
